Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Insert three keys, remove one, check size.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module MapRemoveSize
  (test t (do
    (def m : (Map Str Num) (map.new))
    (map.set m "a" 1)
    (map.set m "b" 2)
    (map.set m "c" 3)
    (map.remove m "b")
    (assert-eq (map.size m) 2)
    (assert-eq (map.has m "b") 0))))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Geometric mean of two positive numbers: sqrt(a*b).

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module GeometricMean
  (defun gmean (a b)
    (math.sqrt (* a b)))
  (test equal (near? (gmean 4.0 4.0) 4.0 0.001))
  (test mix (near? (gmean 2.0 8.0) 4.0 0.001))
  (test one (near? (gmean 1.0 100.0) 10.0 0.001)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Read env, return number of characters.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module EnvLen
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun env_length (k)
    (str_length (env_read k)))
  (test empty (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (env_length "X") 0))
  (test some (mocks (env.get "X" "hello")) (eq? (env_length "X") 5)))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Monthly $10. 10 months prepay = 10% off; 12 months = 20% off.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module Sub
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun discount_pct (months)
    (if (>= months 12) (return 20))
    (if (>= months 10) (return 10))
    0)
  (defun cost (months)
    (def base (* months 10))
    (def d (discount_pct months))
    (round2 (* base (- 1 (/ d 100)))))
  (test one (near? (cost 1) 10.0 0.01))
  (test five (near? (cost 5) 50.0 0.01))
  (test ten (near? (cost 10) 90.0 0.01))
  (test year (near? (cost 12) 96.0 0.01)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Reverse the digits of a non-negative integer.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module ReverseInt
  (defun rev (n)
    (def r 0)
    (def x n)
    (while (> x 0)
      (do
        (set r (+ (* r 10) (math.mod x 10)))
        (set x (/ (- x (math.mod x 10)) 10))))
    r)
  (test small (eq? (rev 123) 321))
  (test trail0 (eq? (rev 1200) 21))
  (test single (eq? (rev 7) 7))
  (test zero (eq? (rev 0) 0)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Count lines: each '\n' starts a new line; trailing non-empty content also counts as a line.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module LineCount
  (extern defun file_read ((path : Str)) : Str @capability "file.read")
  (defun line_count (path)
    (def s (file_read path))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (if (= n 0) (return 0))
    (def c 0)
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (do
        (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) "\n") (set c (+ c 1)) 0)
        (set i (+ i 1))))
    (if (str_eq (str_substring s (- n 1) 1) "\n") c (+ c 1)))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (assert-eq (line_count "/f") 0))
  (test one_terminated (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\n")) (assert-eq (line_count "/f") 1))
  (test two_terminated (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb\n")) (assert-eq (line_count "/f") 2))
  (test two_no_final (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb")) (assert-eq (line_count "/f") 2))
  (test just_newline (mocks (file.read "/f" "\n")) (assert-eq (line_count "/f") 1))
  (test double_nl (mocks (file.read "/f" "\n\n")) (assert-eq (line_count "/f") 2)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Round a positive float to 2 decimal places (half-up).

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module Round2
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math.floor (+ (* x 100.0) 0.5)) 100.0))
  (test zero (near? (round2 0.0) 0.0 0.0001))
  (test exact (near? (round2 1.23) 1.23 0.0001))
  (test up (near? (round2 1.235) 1.24 0.0001))
  (test down (near? (round2 1.234) 1.23 0.0001))
  (test large (near? (round2 12345.678) 12345.68 0.0001)))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Check if two strings have same length (simple anagram precondition).

(module SameLen
  (defun same_length (a b)
    (if (= (str_length a) (str_length b)) 1 0))
  (test yes (eq? (same_length "abc" "xyz") 1))
  (test no (eq? (same_length "a" "ab") 0))
  (test empty (eq? (same_length "" "") 1)))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Read A,B,C env, join with '/'.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module EnvJoin3
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun join3 ()
    (def a (env_read "A"))
    (def b (env_read "B"))
    (def c (env_read "C"))
    (str_concat a (str_concat "/" (str_concat b (str_concat "/" c)))))
  (test all (mocks (env.get "A" "x") (env.get "B" "y") (env.get "C" "z")) (eq? (join3) "x/y/z")))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Right-pad string with c to total length n.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module PadRight
  (defun padr (s c n)
    (def cur (str_length s))
    (def out s)
    (def need (- n cur))
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i need)
      (do
        (set out (str_concat out c))
        (set i (+ i 1))))
    out)
  (test pad (eq? (padr "ab" "." 5) "ab..."))
  (test exact (eq? (padr "abc" "x" 3) "abc"))
  (test long (eq? (padr "longer" "x" 3) "longer")))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Return smaller of two numbers.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module Min2
  (defun my_min (a b)
    (if (< a b) (return a))
    b)
  (test asc (eq? (my_min 1 2) 1))
  (test desc (eq? (my_min 5 3) 3))
  (test eq (eq? (my_min 4 4) 4))
  (test negs (eq? (my_min -3 -7) -7)))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Reusable counter: count items where x > threshold.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module HofCountGT
  (defun gt10 (x) (if (> x 10) 1 0))
  (test t (do
    (def a : (Array Num) (arr.new 6))
    (arr.set a 0 5) (arr.set a 1 10) (arr.set a 2 11) (arr.set a 3 20) (arr.set a 4 9) (arr.set a 5 15)
    (def f : (Array Num) (arr.filter a gt10))
    (assert-eq (arr.length f) 3))))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Build PATH from prefix and suffix env vars; if either missing return '/none'.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module BuildPath
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun build_path ()
    (def a (env_read "BASE"))
    (def b (env_read "SUB"))
    (if (str_eq a "") (return "/none"))
    (if (str_eq b "") (return "/none"))
    (str_concat a (str_concat "/" b)))
  (test both (mocks (env.get "BASE" "/usr") (env.get "SUB" "local")) (eq? (build_path) "/usr/local"))
  (test missing_a (mocks (env.get "BASE" "") (env.get "SUB" "x")) (eq? (build_path) "/none"))
  (test missing_b (mocks (env.get "BASE" "/x") (env.get "SUB" "")) (eq? (build_path) "/none")))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Return min of four numbers.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module MinFour
  (defun min2 (a b)
    (if (< a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun min4 (a b c d)
    (min2 (min2 a b) (min2 c d)))
  (test asc (eq? (min4 1 2 3 4) 1))
  (test desc (eq? (min4 4 3 2 1) 1))
  (test mid (eq? (min4 5 3 8 2) 2))
  (test all_equal (eq? (min4 7 7 7 7) 7))
  (test negs (eq? (min4 -1 -5 -3 -2) -5)))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Return 1 if string is a palindrome, 0 otherwise.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module IsPalindrome
  (defun is_palindrome (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def j (- n 1))
    (while (< i j)
      (if (= (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) (str_substring s j 1)) false)
        (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 1))
      (set j (- j 1)))
    1)
  (test empty (eq? (is_palindrome "") 1))
  (test single (eq? (is_palindrome "a") 1))
  (test yes (eq? (is_palindrome "racecar") 1))
  (test no (eq? (is_palindrome "hello") 0)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Read FIRST and LAST, concat. If both empty, return 'unknown'.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module EnvOrDef
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun combo ()
    (def f (env_read "FIRST"))
    (def l (env_read "LAST"))
    (if (str_eq f "") (if (str_eq l "") (return "unknown") 0) 0)
    (str_concat f l))
  (test both (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "a") (env.get "LAST" "b")) (eq? (combo) "ab"))
  (test only_first (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "a") (env.get "LAST" "")) (eq? (combo) "a"))
  (test neither (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "") (env.get "LAST" "")) (eq? (combo) "unknown")))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Return 'FizzBuzz' if div 15, 'Fizz' if 3, 'Buzz' if 5, else number-as-string.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module FB
  (defun fizzbuzz (n)
    (if (= (math_mod n 15) 0) (return "FizzBuzz"))
    (if (= (math_mod n 3) 0) (return "Fizz"))
    (if (= (math_mod n 5) 0) (return "Buzz"))
    (str_from_num n))
  (test one (eq? (fizzbuzz 1) "1"))
  (test three (eq? (fizzbuzz 3) "Fizz"))
  (test five (eq? (fizzbuzz 5) "Buzz"))
  (test fifteen (eq? (fizzbuzz 15) "FizzBuzz"))
  (test ninety (eq? (fizzbuzz 90) "FizzBuzz")))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Books*price + shipping with threshold + tax.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module Bookstore
  (defun books_total (count price)
    (* count price))
  (defun shipping (subtotal threshold flat)
    (if (>= subtotal threshold) (return 0))
    flat)
  (defun tax_amount (subtotal pct)
    (* subtotal (/ pct 100)))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun total (count price tax_pct)
    (def sub (books_total count price))
    (def ship (shipping sub 50 5))
    (def tax (tax_amount sub tax_pct))
    (round2 (+ sub (+ ship tax))))
  (test small (near? (total 1 10 0) 15.0 0.01))
  (test free_ship (near? (total 5 12 0) 60.0 0.01))
  (test with_tax (near? (total 1 10 8) 15.8 0.05)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Return 1 if file has at least 5 whitespace-separated words.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module FileMinWords
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun has5 (p)
    (def c (file_read p))
    (if (str_eq c "") (return 0))
    (if (>= (arr.length (str_split c " ")) 5) 1 0))
  (test short (mocks (file.read "/a" "a b c")) (eq? (has5 "/a") 0))
  (test exact (mocks (file.read "/a" "a b c d e")) (eq? (has5 "/a") 1))
  (test more (mocks (file.read "/a" "one two three four five six")) (eq? (has5 "/a") 1))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/a" "")) (eq? (has5 "/a") 0)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Compose: triple, add 7, halve. Round to 2.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module Pipe
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun triple (x) (* x 3))
  (defun add7 (x) (+ x 7))
  (defun halve (x) (/ x 2))
  (defun pipeline (x)
    (round2 (halve (add7 (triple x)))))
  (test zero (near? (pipeline 0) 3.5 0.01))
  (test one (near? (pipeline 1) 5.0 0.01))
  (test ten (near? (pipeline 10) 18.5 0.01)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

$30 base, +$0.10/min for first 100 over, +$0.05/min thereafter.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module PhoneTiered
  (defun min2 (a b) (if (< a b) (return a)) b)
  (defun max2 (a b) (if (> a b) (return a)) b)
  (defun bill (mins included)
    (def base 30.0)
    (def over (max2 0 (- mins included)))
    (def tier1 (* (min2 over 100) 0.10))
    (def tier2 (* (max2 0 (- over 100)) 0.05))
    (+ base (+ tier1 tier2)))
  (test under (near? (bill 500 1000) 30.0 0.01))
  (test slight_over (near? (bill 1050 1000) 35.0 0.01))
  (test heavy_over (near? (bill 1300 1000) 50.0 0.01)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Trial-division primality up to sqrt(n).

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module IsPrime
  (defun is_prime (n)
    (if (< n 2) (return 0))
    (if (= n 2) (return 1))
    (if (= (math_mod n 2) 0) (return 0))
    (def i 3)
    (def b (math_floor (math_sqrt n)))
    (while (<= i b)
      (if (= (math_mod n i) 0) (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 2)))
    1)
  (test two (eq? (is_prime 2) 1))
  (test three (eq? (is_prime 3) 1))
  (test four (eq? (is_prime 4) 0))
  (test seventeen (eq? (is_prime 17) 1))
  (test ninety_one (eq? (is_prime 91) 0)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

5-helper meal: protein, carbs, fats, calories, macros + round2.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module Meal5
  (defun protein_cal (g)
    (* g 4))
  (defun carb_cal (g)
    (* g 4))
  (defun fat_cal (g)
    (* g 9))
  (defun fiber_cal (g)
    (* g 2))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun total_calories (p c f fb)
    (round2 (+ (protein_cal p)
               (+ (carb_cal c)
                  (+ (fat_cal f) (fiber_cal fb))))))
  (test simple (near? (total_calories 30 50 10 5) 420.0 0.01))
  (test high_fat (near? (total_calories 20 30 30 0) 470.0 0.01))
  (test high_protein (near? (total_calories 50 20 10 5) 380.0 0.01)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Standard monthly amortization formula.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module LoanClassic
  (defun round2 (x) (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun amortize (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
    (def n (* years 12))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (def growth (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
    (round2 (/ (* (* principal r) growth) (- growth 1))))
  (test mortgage_30y (near? (amortize 200000 4.5 30) 1013.37 0.05))
  (test car_5y (near? (amortize 25000 6 5) 483.32 0.05))
  (test no_interest (near? (amortize 1200 0 1) 100.0 0.05)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Average first n in array.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module ArrAvg
  (defun arr_avg (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def s 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set s (+ s (arr_get xs i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    (/ s n))
  (test simple
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 2) (arr_set a 1 4) (arr_set a 2 6) (arr_set a 3 8)
    (near? (arr_avg a 4) 5.0 0.001)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Standard loan formula with helpers: monthly_rate, total_periods, growth, payment, round2.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module LoanFull
  (defun monthly_rate (annual_pct)
    (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
  (defun total_periods (years)
    (* years 12))
  (defun growth (r n)
    (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
  (defun amortize (p r n)
    (def g (growth r n))
    (/ (* p (* r g)) (- g 1)))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly_payment (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (monthly_rate annual_pct))
    (def n (total_periods years))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (round2 (amortize principal r n)))
  (test zero_rate (near? (monthly_payment 12000 0 1) 1000.0 0.05))
  (test mortgage (near? (monthly_payment 200000 4.5 30) 1013.37 0.05))
  (test car (near? (monthly_payment 25000 6 5) 483.32 0.05)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Class pass: per-class rate with bulk discount.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module ClassPass
  (defun base_per_class (count rate)
    (* count rate))
  (defun bulk_discount (cost count)
    (if (>= count 20) (return (* cost 0.8)))
    (if (>= count 10) (return (* cost 0.9)))
    cost)
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun pass_cost (count rate)
    (round2 (bulk_discount (base_per_class count rate) count)))
  (test small (near? (pass_cost 5 20) 100.0 0.01))
  (test ten (near? (pass_cost 10 20) 180.0 0.01))
  (test twenty (near? (pass_cost 20 20) 320.0 0.01)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Count non-whitespace characters in s.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module NonWsCount
  (defun is_ws (c)
    (if (= c " ") 1 (if (= c "\t") 1 0)))
  (defun nws_count (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def c 0)
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (do
        (if (= (is_ws (str_substring s i 1)) 0) (set c (+ c 1)) 0)
        (set i (+ i 1))))
    c)
  (test simple (eq? (nws_count "abc") 3))
  (test spaces (eq? (nws_count "a b c") 3))
  (test tabs (eq? (nws_count "a\tb") 2))
  (test empty (eq? (nws_count "") 0)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

miles * cost_per_mile + driver tip pct.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module TripTip
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun base (miles rate) (* miles rate))
  (defun with_tip (amount tip_pct)
    (* amount (+ 1 (/ tip_pct 100))))
  (defun total (miles rate tip)
    (round2 (with_tip (base miles rate) tip)))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Sum of Fibonacci numbers up to F(n) (inclusive).

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module FibSum
  (defun fsum (n)
    (def a 0) (def b 1) (def s 0) (def i 0)
    (while (<= i n)
      (do
        (set s (+ s a))
        (def t (+ a b))
        (set a b)
        (set b t)
        (set i (+ i 1))))
    s)
  (test n0 (eq? (fsum 0) 0))
  (test n5 (eq? (fsum 5) 12))
  (test n10 (eq? (fsum 10) 143)))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Read file, return content after first newline (or empty if no newline).

(module StripFirstLine
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun strip (p)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (def idx (str_index_of s "\n"))
    (if (= idx -1) (return ""))
    (str_substring s (+ idx 1) (- (str_length s) (+ idx 1))))
  (test no_nl (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello")) (eq? (strip "/f") ""))
  (test single_nl (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb")) (eq? (strip "/f") "b"))
  (test multi (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb\nc")) (eq? (strip "/f") "b\nc")))

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Check whether a string is a palindrome (case-sensitive).

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module StrPal
  (defun ispal (s)
    (def n (str.length s))
    (def ok 1)
    (def i 0)
    (def j (- n 1))
    (while (< i j)
      (do
        (if (not (= (str.substring s i 1) (str.substring s j 1))) (set ok 0) 0)
        (set i (+ i 1))
        (set j (- j 1))))
    ok)
  (test yes (eq? (ispal "racecar") 1))
  (test no (eq? (ispal "hello") 0))
  (test empty (eq? (ispal "") 1))
  (test single (eq? (ispal "x") 1)))

    price)

Write an AGC module that satisfies this objective:

Trim leading/trailing space simulated via length checks; uppercase; concat with prefix.

Include self-verifying (test ...) blocks. Output ONLY the module source.

(module TextClean
  (defun trim_left (s)
    (def n (str.length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def keep_going 1)
    (while (= keep_going 1)
      (do
        (if (>= i n) (set keep_going 0)
          (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) " ") (set i (+ i 1)) (set keep_going 0)))))
    (str.substring s i (- n i)))
  (defun upper_clean (s)
    (str.upper (trim_left s)))
  (defun decorate (s)
    (str_concat ">> " (upper_clean s)))
  (test plain (eq? (decorate "hello") ">> HELLO"))
  (test indent (eq? (decorate "   hi") ">> HI"))
  (test empty (eq? (decorate "") ">> ")))
Output only AGC (Agentic Compiler) S-expression source code, no prose.

(module Dental

  (defun xray_fee (count) (* count 50))
  (defun filling_fee (count) (* count 200))

    (* cost (- 1 (/ coverage_pct 100))))

    (round2 (apply_insurance total coverage)))

Count digits in string.

(module CountDigits
  (defun is_digit (c)
    (if (str_eq c "0") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "1") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "2") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "3") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "4") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "5") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "6") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "7") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "8") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq c "9") (return 1))
    0)
  (defun count_digits (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set total (+ total (is_digit (str_substring s i 1))))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test all_letters (eq? (count_digits "hello") 0))
  (test all_digits (eq? (count_digits "12345") 5))
  (test mixed (eq? (count_digits "abc123def") 3)))
